# Psalms 119

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

## Verses (176)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Happy are they who are without sin in their ways, walking in the law of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Happy are they who keep his unchanging word, searching after him with all their heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | They do no evil; they go in his ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | You have put your orders into our hearts, so that we might keep them with care. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | If only my ways were ordered so that I might keep your rules! | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Then I would not be put to shame, as long as I have respect for all your teaching. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | I will give you praise with an upright heart in learning your right decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | I will keep your rules: O give me not up completely. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | How may a young man make his way clean? by guiding it after your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | I have made search for you with all my heart: O let me not go wandering far from your teaching. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | I have kept your sayings secretly in my heart, so that I might do no sin against you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Praise be to you, O Lord: give me knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | With my lips have I made clear all the decisions of your mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | I have taken as much delight in the way of your unchanging word, as in all wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | I will give thought to your orders, and have respect for your ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | I will have delight in your rules; I will not let your word go out of my mind. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | Give me, your servant, the reward of life, so that I may keep your word; | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Let my eyes be open to see the wonders of your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | I am living in a strange land: do not let your teachings be kept secret from me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | My soul is broken with desire for your decisions at all times. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Your hand has been against the men of pride, a curse is on those who go wandering out of your way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Take away from me shame and bitter words; for I have kept your unchanging word in my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | Rulers make evil designs against me; but your servant gives thought to your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Your unchanging word is my delight, and the guide of my footsteps. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | My soul is joined to the dust: O give me life, in keeping with your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | I put the record of my ways before you, and you gave me an answer: O give me knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | Make the way of your orders clear to me; then my thoughts will be ever on your wonders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | My soul is wasted with sorrow; give me strength again in keeping with your word | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | Take from me every false way; and in mercy give me your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | I have taken the way of faith: I have kept your decisions before me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | I have been true to your unchanging word; O Lord, do not put me to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | I will go quickly in the way of your teaching, because you have given me a free heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | O Lord, let me see the way of your rules, and I will keep it to the end. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | Give me wisdom, so that I may keep your law; going after it with all my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | Make me go in the way of your teachings; for they are my delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | Let my heart be turned to your unchanging word, and not to evil desire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | Let my eyes be turned away from what is false; give me life in your ways. | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | Give effect to your word to your servant, in whose heart is the fear of you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | Take away the shame which is my fear; for your decisions are good. | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | See how great is my desire for your orders: give me life in your righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
| [41](BBE.md#v41) | Let your mercies come to me, O Lord, even your salvation, as you have said. | [WEB](WEB.md#v41) · [KJV](KJV.md#v41) · [ASV](ASV.md#v41) |
| [42](BBE.md#v42) | So that I may have an answer for the man who would put me to shame; for I have faith in your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v42) · [KJV](KJV.md#v42) · [ASV](ASV.md#v42) |
| [43](BBE.md#v43) | Take not your true word quite out of my mouth; for I have put my hope in your decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v43) · [KJV](KJV.md#v43) · [ASV](ASV.md#v43) |
| [44](BBE.md#v44) | So that I may keep your law for ever and ever; | [WEB](WEB.md#v44) · [KJV](KJV.md#v44) · [ASV](ASV.md#v44) |
| [45](BBE.md#v45) | So that my way may be in a wide place: because my search has been for your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v45) · [KJV](KJV.md#v45) · [ASV](ASV.md#v45) |
| [46](BBE.md#v46) | So that I may give knowledge of your unchanging word before kings, and not be put to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v46) · [KJV](KJV.md#v46) · [ASV](ASV.md#v46) |
| [47](BBE.md#v47) | And so that I may take delight in your teachings, to which I have given my love. | [WEB](WEB.md#v47) · [KJV](KJV.md#v47) · [ASV](ASV.md#v47) |
| [48](BBE.md#v48) | And so that my hands may be stretched out to you; and I will give thought to your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v48) · [KJV](KJV.md#v48) · [ASV](ASV.md#v48) |
| [49](BBE.md#v49) | Keep in mind your word to your servant, for on it has my hope been fixed. | [WEB](WEB.md#v49) · [KJV](KJV.md#v49) · [ASV](ASV.md#v49) |
| [50](BBE.md#v50) | This is my comfort in my trouble; that your sayings have given me life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v50) · [KJV](KJV.md#v50) · [ASV](ASV.md#v50) |
| [51](BBE.md#v51) | The men of pride have made great sport of me; but I have not been turned from your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v51) · [KJV](KJV.md#v51) · [ASV](ASV.md#v51) |
| [52](BBE.md#v52) | I have kept the memory of your decisions from times past, O Lord; and they have been my comfort. | [WEB](WEB.md#v52) · [KJV](KJV.md#v52) · [ASV](ASV.md#v52) |
| [53](BBE.md#v53) | I am burning with wrath, because of the sinners who have given up your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v53) · [KJV](KJV.md#v53) · [ASV](ASV.md#v53) |
| [54](BBE.md#v54) | Your rules have been melodies to me, while I have been living in strange lands. | [WEB](WEB.md#v54) · [KJV](KJV.md#v54) · [ASV](ASV.md#v54) |
| [55](BBE.md#v55) | I have given thought to your name in the night, O Lord, and have kept your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v55) · [KJV](KJV.md#v55) · [ASV](ASV.md#v55) |
| [56](BBE.md#v56) | This has been true of me, that I have kept your orders in my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v56) · [KJV](KJV.md#v56) · [ASV](ASV.md#v56) |
| [57](BBE.md#v57) | The Lord is my heritage: I have said that I would be ruled by your words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v57) · [KJV](KJV.md#v57) · [ASV](ASV.md#v57) |
| [58](BBE.md#v58) | I have given my mind to do your pleasure with all my heart; have mercy on me, as you have said. | [WEB](WEB.md#v58) · [KJV](KJV.md#v58) · [ASV](ASV.md#v58) |
| [59](BBE.md#v59) | I gave thought to my steps, and my feet were turned into the way of your unchanging word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v59) · [KJV](KJV.md#v59) · [ASV](ASV.md#v59) |
| [60](BBE.md#v60) | I was quick to do your orders, and let no time be wasted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v60) · [KJV](KJV.md#v60) · [ASV](ASV.md#v60) |
| [61](BBE.md#v61) | The cords of evil-doers are round me; but I have kept in mind your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v61) · [KJV](KJV.md#v61) · [ASV](ASV.md#v61) |
| [62](BBE.md#v62) | In the middle of the night I will get up to give you praise, because of all your right decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v62) · [KJV](KJV.md#v62) · [ASV](ASV.md#v62) |
| [63](BBE.md#v63) | I keep company with all your worshippers, and those who have your orders in their memory. | [WEB](WEB.md#v63) · [KJV](KJV.md#v63) · [ASV](ASV.md#v63) |
| [64](BBE.md#v64) | The earth, O Lord, is full of your mercy: give me knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v64) · [KJV](KJV.md#v64) · [ASV](ASV.md#v64) |
| [65](BBE.md#v65) | You have done good to your servant, O Lord, in keeping with your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v65) · [KJV](KJV.md#v65) · [ASV](ASV.md#v65) |
| [66](BBE.md#v66) | Give me knowledge and good sense; for I have put my faith in your teachings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v66) · [KJV](KJV.md#v66) · [ASV](ASV.md#v66) |
| [67](BBE.md#v67) | Before I was in trouble I went out of the way; but now I keep your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v67) · [KJV](KJV.md#v67) · [ASV](ASV.md#v67) |
| [68](BBE.md#v68) | You are good, and your works are good; give me knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v68) · [KJV](KJV.md#v68) · [ASV](ASV.md#v68) |
| [69](BBE.md#v69) | The men of pride have said false things about me; but I will keep your orders in my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v69) · [KJV](KJV.md#v69) · [ASV](ASV.md#v69) |
| [70](BBE.md#v70) | Their hearts are shut up with fat; but my delight is in your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v70) · [KJV](KJV.md#v70) · [ASV](ASV.md#v70) |
| [71](BBE.md#v71) | It is good for me to have been through trouble; so that I might come to the knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v71) · [KJV](KJV.md#v71) · [ASV](ASV.md#v71) |
| [72](BBE.md#v72) | The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of gold and silver. | [WEB](WEB.md#v72) · [KJV](KJV.md#v72) · [ASV](ASV.md#v72) |
| [73](BBE.md#v73) | Your hands have made me, and given me form: give me wisdom, so that I may have knowledge of your teaching. | [WEB](WEB.md#v73) · [KJV](KJV.md#v73) · [ASV](ASV.md#v73) |
| [74](BBE.md#v74) | Your worshippers will see me and be glad; because my hope has been in your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v74) · [KJV](KJV.md#v74) · [ASV](ASV.md#v74) |
| [75](BBE.md#v75) | I have seen, O Lord, that your decisions are right, and that in unchanging faith you have sent trouble on me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v75) · [KJV](KJV.md#v75) · [ASV](ASV.md#v75) |
| [76](BBE.md#v76) | Let your mercy now be my comfort, as you have said to your servant. | [WEB](WEB.md#v76) · [KJV](KJV.md#v76) · [ASV](ASV.md#v76) |
| [77](BBE.md#v77) | Let your gentle mercies come to me, so that I may have life; for your law is my delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v77) · [KJV](KJV.md#v77) · [ASV](ASV.md#v77) |
| [78](BBE.md#v78) | Let the men of pride be shamed; because they have falsely given decision against me; but I will give thought to your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v78) · [KJV](KJV.md#v78) · [ASV](ASV.md#v78) |
| [79](BBE.md#v79) | Let your worshippers be turned to me, and those who have knowledge of your words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v79) · [KJV](KJV.md#v79) · [ASV](ASV.md#v79) |
| [80](BBE.md#v80) | Let all my heart be given to your orders, so that I may not be put to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v80) · [KJV](KJV.md#v80) · [ASV](ASV.md#v80) |
| [81](BBE.md#v81) | My soul is wasted with desire for your salvation: but I have hope in your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v81) · [KJV](KJV.md#v81) · [ASV](ASV.md#v81) |
| [82](BBE.md#v82) | My eyes are full of weariness with searching for your word, saying, When will you give me comfort? | [WEB](WEB.md#v82) · [KJV](KJV.md#v82) · [ASV](ASV.md#v82) |
| [83](BBE.md#v83) | For I have become like a wine-skin black with smoke; but I still keep the memory of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v83) · [KJV](KJV.md#v83) · [ASV](ASV.md#v83) |
| [84](BBE.md#v84) | How short is the life of your servant! when will you give your decision against those who are attacking me? | [WEB](WEB.md#v84) · [KJV](KJV.md#v84) · [ASV](ASV.md#v84) |
| [85](BBE.md#v85) | The men of pride, who are turned away from your law, have put nets for me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v85) · [KJV](KJV.md#v85) · [ASV](ASV.md#v85) |
| [86](BBE.md#v86) | All your teachings are certain; they go after me with evil design; give me your help. | [WEB](WEB.md#v86) · [KJV](KJV.md#v86) · [ASV](ASV.md#v86) |
| [87](BBE.md#v87) | They had almost put an end to me on earth; but I did not give up your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v87) · [KJV](KJV.md#v87) · [ASV](ASV.md#v87) |
| [88](BBE.md#v88) | Give me life in your mercy; so that I may be ruled by the unchanging word of your mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v88) · [KJV](KJV.md#v88) · [ASV](ASV.md#v88) |
| [89](BBE.md#v89) | For ever, O Lord, your word is fixed in heaven. | [WEB](WEB.md#v89) · [KJV](KJV.md#v89) · [ASV](ASV.md#v89) |
| [90](BBE.md#v90) | Your faith is unchanging from generation to generation: you have put the earth in its place, and it is not moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v90) · [KJV](KJV.md#v90) · [ASV](ASV.md#v90) |
| [91](BBE.md#v91) | They are ruled this day by your decisions; for all things are your servants. | [WEB](WEB.md#v91) · [KJV](KJV.md#v91) · [ASV](ASV.md#v91) |
| [92](BBE.md#v92) | If your law had not been my delight, my troubles would have put an end to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v92) · [KJV](KJV.md#v92) · [ASV](ASV.md#v92) |
| [93](BBE.md#v93) | I will ever keep your orders in mind; for in them I have life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v93) · [KJV](KJV.md#v93) · [ASV](ASV.md#v93) |
| [94](BBE.md#v94) | I am yours, O be my saviour; for my desire has been for your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v94) · [KJV](KJV.md#v94) · [ASV](ASV.md#v94) |
| [95](BBE.md#v95) | The sinners have been waiting for me to give me up to destruction; but I will give all my mind to your unchanging ward. | [WEB](WEB.md#v95) · [KJV](KJV.md#v95) · [ASV](ASV.md#v95) |
| [96](BBE.md#v96) | I have seen that nothing on earth is complete; but your teaching is very wide. | [WEB](WEB.md#v96) · [KJV](KJV.md#v96) · [ASV](ASV.md#v96) |
| [97](BBE.md#v97) | O what love I have for your law! I give thought to it all the day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v97) · [KJV](KJV.md#v97) · [ASV](ASV.md#v97) |
| [98](BBE.md#v98) | Your teaching has made me wiser than my haters: for it is mine for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v98) · [KJV](KJV.md#v98) · [ASV](ASV.md#v98) |
| [99](BBE.md#v99) | I have more knowledge than all my teachers, because I give thought to your unchanging word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v99) · [KJV](KJV.md#v99) · [ASV](ASV.md#v99) |
| [100](BBE.md#v100) | I have more wisdom than the old, because I have kept your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v100) · [KJV](KJV.md#v100) · [ASV](ASV.md#v100) |
| [101](BBE.md#v101) | I have kept back my feet from all evil ways, so that I might be true to your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v101) · [KJV](KJV.md#v101) · [ASV](ASV.md#v101) |
| [102](BBE.md#v102) | My heart has not been turned away from your decisions; for you have been my teacher. | [WEB](WEB.md#v102) · [KJV](KJV.md#v102) · [ASV](ASV.md#v102) |
| [103](BBE.md#v103) | How sweet are your sayings to my taste! truly, they are sweeter than honey in my mouth! | [WEB](WEB.md#v103) · [KJV](KJV.md#v103) · [ASV](ASV.md#v103) |
| [104](BBE.md#v104) | Through your orders I get wisdom; for this reason I am a hater of every false way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v104) · [KJV](KJV.md#v104) · [ASV](ASV.md#v104) |
| [105](BBE.md#v105) | Your word is a light for my feet, ever shining on my way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v105) · [KJV](KJV.md#v105) · [ASV](ASV.md#v105) |
| [106](BBE.md#v106) | I have made an oath and kept it, to be guided by your upright decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v106) · [KJV](KJV.md#v106) · [ASV](ASV.md#v106) |
| [107](BBE.md#v107) | I am greatly troubled, O Lord, give me life in keeping with your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v107) · [KJV](KJV.md#v107) · [ASV](ASV.md#v107) |
| [108](BBE.md#v108) | Take, O Lord, the free offerings of my mouth, and give me knowledge of your decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v108) · [KJV](KJV.md#v108) · [ASV](ASV.md#v108) |
| [109](BBE.md#v109) | My soul is ever in danger; but I still keep the memory of your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v109) · [KJV](KJV.md#v109) · [ASV](ASV.md#v109) |
| [110](BBE.md#v110) | Sinners have put a net to take me; but I was true to your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v110) · [KJV](KJV.md#v110) · [ASV](ASV.md#v110) |
| [111](BBE.md#v111) | I have taken your unchanging word as an eternal heritage; for it is the joy of my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v111) · [KJV](KJV.md#v111) · [ASV](ASV.md#v111) |
| [112](BBE.md#v112) | My heart is ever ready to keep your rules, even to the end. | [WEB](WEB.md#v112) · [KJV](KJV.md#v112) · [ASV](ASV.md#v112) |
| [113](BBE.md#v113) | I am a hater of men of doubting mind; but I am a lover of your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v113) · [KJV](KJV.md#v113) · [ASV](ASV.md#v113) |
| [114](BBE.md#v114) | You are my secret place and my breastplate against danger; my hope is in your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v114) · [KJV](KJV.md#v114) · [ASV](ASV.md#v114) |
| [115](BBE.md#v115) | Go far from me, you evil-doers; so that I may keep the teachings of my God. | [WEB](WEB.md#v115) · [KJV](KJV.md#v115) · [ASV](ASV.md#v115) |
| [116](BBE.md#v116) | Be my support as you have said, and give me life; let not my hope be turned to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v116) · [KJV](KJV.md#v116) · [ASV](ASV.md#v116) |
| [117](BBE.md#v117) | Let me not be moved, and I will be safe, and ever take delight in your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v117) · [KJV](KJV.md#v117) · [ASV](ASV.md#v117) |
| [118](BBE.md#v118) | You have overcome all those who are wandering from your rules; for all their thoughts are false. | [WEB](WEB.md#v118) · [KJV](KJV.md#v118) · [ASV](ASV.md#v118) |
| [119](BBE.md#v119) | All the sinners of the earth are like waste metal in your eyes; and for this cause I give my love to your unchanging word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v119) · [KJV](KJV.md#v119) · [ASV](ASV.md#v119) |
| [120](BBE.md#v120) | My flesh is moved for fear of you; I give honour to your decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v120) · [KJV](KJV.md#v120) · [ASV](ASV.md#v120) |
| [121](BBE.md#v121) | I have done what is good and right: you will not give me into the hands of those who are working against me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v121) · [KJV](KJV.md#v121) · [ASV](ASV.md#v121) |
| [122](BBE.md#v122) | Take your servant's interests into your keeping; let me not be crushed by the men of pride. | [WEB](WEB.md#v122) · [KJV](KJV.md#v122) · [ASV](ASV.md#v122) |
| [123](BBE.md#v123) | My eyes are wasted with desire for your salvation, and for the word of your righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v123) · [KJV](KJV.md#v123) · [ASV](ASV.md#v123) |
| [124](BBE.md#v124) | Be good to your servant in your mercy, and give me teaching in your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v124) · [KJV](KJV.md#v124) · [ASV](ASV.md#v124) |
| [125](BBE.md#v125) | I am your servant; give me wisdom, so that I may have knowledge of your unchanging word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v125) · [KJV](KJV.md#v125) · [ASV](ASV.md#v125) |
| [126](BBE.md#v126) | It is time, O Lord, for you to let your work be seen; for they have made your law without effect. | [WEB](WEB.md#v126) · [KJV](KJV.md#v126) · [ASV](ASV.md#v126) |
| [127](BBE.md#v127) | For this reason I have greater love far your teachings than for gold, even for shining gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v127) · [KJV](KJV.md#v127) · [ASV](ASV.md#v127) |
| [128](BBE.md#v128) | Because of it I keep straight in all things by your orders; and I am a hater of every false way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v128) · [KJV](KJV.md#v128) · [ASV](ASV.md#v128) |
| [129](BBE.md#v129) | Your unchanging word is full of wonder; for this reason my soul keeps it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v129) · [KJV](KJV.md#v129) · [ASV](ASV.md#v129) |
| [130](BBE.md#v130) | The opening of your words gives light; it gives good sense to the simple. | [WEB](WEB.md#v130) · [KJV](KJV.md#v130) · [ASV](ASV.md#v130) |
| [131](BBE.md#v131) | My mouth was open wide, waiting with great desire for your teachings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v131) · [KJV](KJV.md#v131) · [ASV](ASV.md#v131) |
| [132](BBE.md#v132) | Let your eyes be turned to me, and have mercy on me, as it is right for you to do to those who are lovers of your name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v132) · [KJV](KJV.md#v132) · [ASV](ASV.md#v132) |
| [133](BBE.md#v133) | Let my steps be guided by your word; and let not sin have control over me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v133) · [KJV](KJV.md#v133) · [ASV](ASV.md#v133) |
| [134](BBE.md#v134) | Make me free from the cruel rule of man; then I will keep your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v134) · [KJV](KJV.md#v134) · [ASV](ASV.md#v134) |
| [135](BBE.md#v135) | Let your servant see the shining of your face; give me knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v135) · [KJV](KJV.md#v135) · [ASV](ASV.md#v135) |
| [136](BBE.md#v136) | Rivers of water are flowing from my eyes, because men do not keep your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v136) · [KJV](KJV.md#v136) · [ASV](ASV.md#v136) |
| [137](BBE.md#v137) | O Lord, great is your righteousness, and upright are your decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v137) · [KJV](KJV.md#v137) · [ASV](ASV.md#v137) |
| [138](BBE.md#v138) | You have given your unchanging word in righteousness, and it is for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v138) · [KJV](KJV.md#v138) · [ASV](ASV.md#v138) |
| [139](BBE.md#v139) | My passion has overcome me; because my haters are turned away from your words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v139) · [KJV](KJV.md#v139) · [ASV](ASV.md#v139) |
| [140](BBE.md#v140) | Your word is of tested value; and it is dear to your servant. | [WEB](WEB.md#v140) · [KJV](KJV.md#v140) · [ASV](ASV.md#v140) |
| [141](BBE.md#v141) | I am small and of no account; but I keep your orders in mind. | [WEB](WEB.md#v141) · [KJV](KJV.md#v141) · [ASV](ASV.md#v141) |
| [142](BBE.md#v142) | Your righteousness is an unchanging righteousness, and your law is certain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v142) · [KJV](KJV.md#v142) · [ASV](ASV.md#v142) |
| [143](BBE.md#v143) | Pain and trouble have overcome me: but your teachings are my delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v143) · [KJV](KJV.md#v143) · [ASV](ASV.md#v143) |
| [144](BBE.md#v144) | The righteousness of your unchanging word is eternal; give me wisdom so that I may have life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v144) · [KJV](KJV.md#v144) · [ASV](ASV.md#v144) |
| [145](BBE.md#v145) | I have made my prayer with all my heart; give answer to me, O Lord: I will keep your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v145) · [KJV](KJV.md#v145) · [ASV](ASV.md#v145) |
| [146](BBE.md#v146) | My cry has gone up to you; take me out of trouble, and I will be guided by your unchanging word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v146) · [KJV](KJV.md#v146) · [ASV](ASV.md#v146) |
| [147](BBE.md#v147) | Before the sun is up, my cry for help comes to your ear; my hope is in your words. | [WEB](WEB.md#v147) · [KJV](KJV.md#v147) · [ASV](ASV.md#v147) |
| [148](BBE.md#v148) | In the night watches I am awake, so that I may give thought to your saying. | [WEB](WEB.md#v148) · [KJV](KJV.md#v148) · [ASV](ASV.md#v148) |
| [149](BBE.md#v149) | Let my voice come to you, in your mercy; O Lord, by your decisions give me life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v149) · [KJV](KJV.md#v149) · [ASV](ASV.md#v149) |
| [150](BBE.md#v150) | Those who have evil designs against me come near; they are far from your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v150) · [KJV](KJV.md#v150) · [ASV](ASV.md#v150) |
| [151](BBE.md#v151) | You are near, O Lord; and all your teachings are true. | [WEB](WEB.md#v151) · [KJV](KJV.md#v151) · [ASV](ASV.md#v151) |
| [152](BBE.md#v152) | I have long had knowledge that your unchanging word is for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v152) · [KJV](KJV.md#v152) · [ASV](ASV.md#v152) |
| [153](BBE.md#v153) | O see my trouble, and be my saviour; for I keep your law in my mind, | [WEB](WEB.md#v153) · [KJV](KJV.md#v153) · [ASV](ASV.md#v153) |
| [154](BBE.md#v154) | Undertake my cause, and come to my help, give me life, as you have said. | [WEB](WEB.md#v154) · [KJV](KJV.md#v154) · [ASV](ASV.md#v154) |
| [155](BBE.md#v155) | Salvation is far from evil-doers; for they have made no search for your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v155) · [KJV](KJV.md#v155) · [ASV](ASV.md#v155) |
| [156](BBE.md#v156) | Great is the number of your mercies, O Lord; give me life in keeping with your decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v156) · [KJV](KJV.md#v156) · [ASV](ASV.md#v156) |
| [157](BBE.md#v157) | Great is the number of those who are against me; but I have not been turned away from your unchanging word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v157) · [KJV](KJV.md#v157) · [ASV](ASV.md#v157) |
| [158](BBE.md#v158) | I saw with hate those who were untrue to you; for they did not keep your saying. | [WEB](WEB.md#v158) · [KJV](KJV.md#v158) · [ASV](ASV.md#v158) |
| [159](BBE.md#v159) | See how great is my love for your orders: give me life, O Lord, in keeping with your mercy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v159) · [KJV](KJV.md#v159) · [ASV](ASV.md#v159) |
| [160](BBE.md#v160) | Your word is true from the first; and your upright decision is unchanging for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v160) · [KJV](KJV.md#v160) · [ASV](ASV.md#v160) |
| [161](BBE.md#v161) | Rulers have been cruel to me without cause; but I have the fear of your word in my heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v161) · [KJV](KJV.md#v161) · [ASV](ASV.md#v161) |
| [162](BBE.md#v162) | I am delighted by your saying, like a man who makes discovery of great wealth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v162) · [KJV](KJV.md#v162) · [ASV](ASV.md#v162) |
| [163](BBE.md#v163) | I am full of hate and disgust for false words; but I am a lover of your law. | [WEB](WEB.md#v163) · [KJV](KJV.md#v163) · [ASV](ASV.md#v163) |
| [164](BBE.md#v164) | Seven times a day do I give you praise, because of your upright decisions. | [WEB](WEB.md#v164) · [KJV](KJV.md#v164) · [ASV](ASV.md#v164) |
| [165](BBE.md#v165) | Great peace have lovers of your law; they have no cause for falling. | [WEB](WEB.md#v165) · [KJV](KJV.md#v165) · [ASV](ASV.md#v165) |
| [166](BBE.md#v166) | Lord, my hope has been in your salvation; and I have kept your teachings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v166) · [KJV](KJV.md#v166) · [ASV](ASV.md#v166) |
| [167](BBE.md#v167) | My soul has kept your unchanging word; great is my love for it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v167) · [KJV](KJV.md#v167) · [ASV](ASV.md#v167) |
| [168](BBE.md#v168) | I have been ruled by your orders; for all my ways are before you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v168) · [KJV](KJV.md#v168) · [ASV](ASV.md#v168) |
| [169](BBE.md#v169) | Let my cry come before you, O Lord; give me wisdom in keeping with your word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v169) · [KJV](KJV.md#v169) · [ASV](ASV.md#v169) |
| [170](BBE.md#v170) | Let my prayer come before you; take me out of trouble, as you have said. | [WEB](WEB.md#v170) · [KJV](KJV.md#v170) · [ASV](ASV.md#v170) |
| [171](BBE.md#v171) | Let my lips be flowing with praise, because you have given me knowledge of your rules. | [WEB](WEB.md#v171) · [KJV](KJV.md#v171) · [ASV](ASV.md#v171) |
| [172](BBE.md#v172) | Let my tongue make songs in praise of your word; for all your teachings are righteousness. | [WEB](WEB.md#v172) · [KJV](KJV.md#v172) · [ASV](ASV.md#v172) |
| [173](BBE.md#v173) | Let your hand be near for my help; for I have given my heart to your orders. | [WEB](WEB.md#v173) · [KJV](KJV.md#v173) · [ASV](ASV.md#v173) |
| [174](BBE.md#v174) | All my desire has been for your salvation, O Lord; and your law is my delight. | [WEB](WEB.md#v174) · [KJV](KJV.md#v174) · [ASV](ASV.md#v174) |
| [175](BBE.md#v175) | Give life to my soul so that it may give you praise; and let your decisions be my support. | [WEB](WEB.md#v175) · [KJV](KJV.md#v175) · [ASV](ASV.md#v175) |
| [176](BBE.md#v176) | I have gone out of the way like a wandering sheep; make search for your servant; for I keep your teachings ever in mind. | [WEB](WEB.md#v176) · [KJV](KJV.md#v176) · [ASV](ASV.md#v176) |
